title: carpinus dayongiana
intro: Carpinus dayongiana is a species of deciduous tree in the family Betulaceae, native to China. The bark and leaves of Carpinus dayongiana are used in traditional Chinese medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. This plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving coughs, as well as protecting against cardiovascular diseases and cancer. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are typically dried, powdered, or made into decoctions to be consumed as a tea or added to other medicinal formulas.
